name: MailBlast
tagline: Send campaigns, build automations, and grow your list. Drag-and-drop email builder, segmentation, and deliverability tools. Free, with no subscriber limits.
metaDescription: MailBlast is a free email marketing platform that replaces Mailchimp. Build campaigns, automate sequences, segment audiences, and track performance. No subscriber caps.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">📧</text></svg>

features.title: Drag-and-Drop Editor
features.desc: Build beautiful, responsive emails with a visual editor. Choose from 100+ templates or start from scratch. Every email renders perfectly across Gmail, Outlook, and mobile clients.

features.title: Automation Workflows
features.desc: Create multi-step email sequences triggered by signups, purchases, clicks, or custom events. Visual workflow builder makes complex drip campaigns intuitive to design.

features.title: Audience Segmentation
features.desc: Segment your list by behavior, demographics, purchase history, or engagement level. Send the right message to the right people at the right time with dynamic segments.

features.title: Campaign Analytics
features.desc: Track opens, clicks, bounces, and unsubscribes in real time. Revenue attribution shows exactly how much money each email earns. Compare campaigns side by side.

features.title: Deliverability Tools
features.desc: Built-in SPF, DKIM, and DMARC configuration. Spam score checker previews inbox placement before you send. Dedicated IP options keep your sender reputation clean.

features.title: Landing Pages & Forms
features.desc: Build high-converting signup forms, pop-ups, and landing pages to grow your list. A/B test variations and track conversion rates without a separate tool.

includes: A/B testing for subject lines and content
